message:
feat(engine): wire RuntimeConfig into orchestrator, bayesian priors, decision thresholds, and containment executor

Connect the new RuntimeConfig to four engine subsystems:

- execution_orchestrator: gains runtime_config field and
  new_with_runtime_config() constructor; adaptive router gamma and
  CUSUM stopping policy parameters read from config; refactor
  or_insert_with closure to avoid borrow-checker conflict
- bayesian_posterior: Posterior::from_prior_config(&BayesianPriorsConfig)
  constructor with 5 tests verifying defaults, custom priors, and
  sum-to-MILLION invariant
- expected_loss_selector: extract classify_alien_risk_alert_with_thresholds()
  taking &DecisionThresholdsConfig; existing function delegates with defaults
- containment_executor: ContainmentContext::with_config_timeouts() constructor;
  measure real duration_ns via Instant::now() instead of hardcoded 0;
  exclude duration_ns from canonical_bytes() for deterministic replay;
  4 new tests for duration, hashing, and config roundtrip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
